zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Goodale於1510年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾堂納姆時，他的父親Sir Thomas Goodale20歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Ulam18歲。他於1539年5月7日與Margaret Dorman在英國賀特福爾格亞特 貝可哈普斯亞德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1543年在英國英格蘭越可爾瓦姆斯沃斯享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Goodale于1510年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾堂納姆时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Goodale20岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Ulam18岁。他于1539年5月7日与Margaret Dorman在英国賀特福爾格亞特 貝可哈普斯亞德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1543年在英国英格兰越可爾瓦姆斯沃斯享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Goodale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Goodall  .

variants.name: Goodall
meanings: metonymic occupational name from Middle English god(e) ‘good’ + ale ‘ale’; perhaps denoting an innkeeper or tan ale taster. An ale taster was a manorial or borough court official appointed to regulate the quality of ale sold by inns and alewives, especially with the duty of preventing the sale of sour or watered-down ale.
alternatively, it may be a habitational name from Gowdall near Snaith, in Yorkshire. This place was named in Old English with golde ‘marigold’ + halh ‘nook, recess’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Goodale was born in 1510, in Downham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Goodale, was 20 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Ulam, was 18. He married Margaret Dorman on 7 May 1539, in Great Berkhampstead, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1543, in Warmsworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Goodale est né en 1510, à Downham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Goodale, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Ulam, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Dorman le 7 mai 1539, à Great Berkhampstead, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1543, à Warmsworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Goodale 1510 in Downham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Goodale 20 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Ulam 18. Er hat am 7. Mai 1539 in Great Berkhampstead, Hertfordshire, England Margaret Dorman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1543 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Warmsworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Goodale è nato il nel 1510 nel Downham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Goodale, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Ulam, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Dorman il 7 maggio 1539, nel Great Berkhampstead, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1543, nel Warmsworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Goodaleが1510年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアダウンハムで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Goodaleは20歳，母Lady Elizabeth Ulamは18歳であった。1539年5月7日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアグレアト バークハンプステアドでMargaret Dormanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1543年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアワームスウオルスで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Goodale(이)가 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 다운함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Goodale(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Ulam(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1539년 5월 7일 영국 허트퍼드실르 그리트 버카프스테아드에서 Margaret Dorman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1543년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 워스워스에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Goodale nasceu em 1510, em Downham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Goodale, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Ulam, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Dorman em 7 de maio de 1539, em Great Berkhampstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1543, em Warmsworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Goodale родился в 1510 г. в местности доунам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Goodale было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Ulam, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Dorman 7 мая 1539 г. в местности грит бирхампстид, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1543 г. в местности вармсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Goodale nació en 1510, en Downham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Goodale, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Ulam, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Margaret Dorman el 7 de mayo de 1539, en Great Berkhampstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1543, en Warmsworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años.
